notes: Several files have content mismatches. The 'In Memory of the Martyrdom' file contains Margaret Gay Judd Clawson content instead. The Editorial file contains unrelated content about Mrs. Moyle. The Clawson reminiscences file ends abruptly mid-sentence. Two articles from the table of contents (Verses and the actual In Memory of the Martyrdom content) appear to be missing entirely from the extracted files.
